content.question: If Wales-style redefinition or Finland-style tiering were transferred to Hungary, what role would existing ethnic segregation patterns and Roma overrepresentation play, and would transferred models require supplementary desegregation safeguards to achieve intended outcomes?
content.reduction_path: Model the interaction between any proposed Hungarian reform (e.g., ALN-type redefinition, tiered support decoupling) and current ethnic composition of SEN rolls; compare outcomes under reform scenarios with and without explicit segregation-monitoring and parent-advocacy mechanisms; consult European Agency and ECtHR compliance frameworks for required safeguards.
